name: Type Theory — Simply Typed λ-Calculus
description: Simple types: base types, A→B. Typing judgment Γ ⊢ M : A. Typing rules: var, app, abs. Subject reduction: typable terms reduce to typable terms.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Simple type\nbase, A→B"]
    D2["Def: Context\nΓ = x1:A1,..."]
    D3["Def: Typing judgment\nΓ ⊢ M : A"]
    R1["Rule: Var\nx:A in Γ ⇒ Γ⊢x:A"]
    R2["Rule: App\nΓ⊢M:A→B Γ⊢N:A ⇒ Γ⊢MN:B"]
    R3["Rule: Abs\nΓ,x:A⊢M:B ⇒ Γ⊢λx.M:A→B"]
    T1["Thm: Subject reduction\nM→N, Γ⊢M:A ⇒ Γ⊢N:A"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> R1
    D3 --> R2
    D3 --> R3
    R1 --> T1
    R2 --> T1
    R3 --> T1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef axiom fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3 definition
    class R1,R2,R3 axiom
    class T1 theorem
